changelog: Discord support — TamerClaw agents now work on Discord. Run ./tamerclaw discord setup to connect your bot. Full slash commands, streaming responses, multi-language, session management, media handling. Same Supreme Agent experience, now on Discord.

new.desc: Send a message to the AI assistant (Discord slash command)

history.changelog: Fix /whatsnew and /changelog commands — wired handlers into bot-template and bridge

Post-update announcement system — Supreme Agent now announces what's new after every ./tamerclaw update. New /changelog and /whatsnew commands for all agents. Feature knowledge base maps modules to user-facing commands.

Full agency delegation infrastructure — 18 new shared modules (delegation-router, task-registry, team-discovery, coordinator, etc.), Mac Mini GUI automation, updated bridge/supreme with dynamic model routing, hardened inbox-watcher with phantom detection.

Agency Powerup — ./tamerclaw powerup sets up a full software agency with CTO, CMO, and specialized agents. Includes 17 new shared modules, mobile store publishing pipeline, and Anthropic SDK integration.
Friendly API error messages — billing limits, rate limits, auth errors now show clean user-facing messages instead of raw JSON dumps
All Claude models online + Mac Mini compute tools
